title: ChaCha20-Poly1305 and Algorithm Choice · Mastery Check
summary: A release board compares near-miss decisions for chacha20-poly1305 and algorithm choice and accepts only bounded behavior, causal changed-case evidence, and an explicit native, entropy, interoperability, side-channel, compliance, or production transfer gate. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for portable AEAD selection and compatibility matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use ChaCha20-Poly1305 through its AEAD contract with correct key, nonce, tag, additional-data, and failure handling.
Distinguish standard and XChaCha nonce sizes, interoperability, random-nonce design, and protocol compatibility.
Choose AES-GCM or ChaCha20-Poly1305 from platform acceleration, protocol requirements, misuse risk, compliance, interoperability, and measured performance.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Crypto Go Chacha Aead Contract · changed case · Quiz Crypto Go Chacha Aead Cont…
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz cryptographic engineering team handles case 3649 during a certificate rollover incident. Build deterministic Go evidence to select and verify standard or XChaCha20-Poly1305 with exact sizes, AAD, vectors, and interoperability; keep browser execution deterministic and move production entropy, native timing, non-allowlisted crypto, network, HSM, and compliance claims to authorized transfer gates; then double attacker-controlled size or work and remain inside the admission budget. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Use ChaCha20-Poly1305 through its AEAD contract with correct key, nonce, tag, additional-data, and failure handling.
